summary: Iteration 8: Visual refactoring with Lucide icons. All features verified: Dashboard EventType cards with icons/counter/progress bar, status chart removed (only types), Calendar legend + month analysis chips with icons, Reservations Lucide icons in type column, backend /api/notifications/pending works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 iterations features working. App at /dashboard, /reservaciones, /calendario, /ajustes - no login needed. eventConfig.js provides Lucide icons per event type (Heart=Boda, Crown=Quinceañera, PartyPopper=Fiesta Social, Briefcase=Evento Corporativo, Monitor=Conferencia, CalendarDays=Otro). Dashboard shows EventTypeCard components with animated counters+progress bars. Calendar shows legend badges and month analysis chips with Lucide icons. Reservations table column TIPO uses Lucide icons. No emojis found.
